name: Worksport Ltd
business: Worksport Ltd. designs, develops, and manufactures tonneau covers (soft and hard), solar-integrated tonneau covers (SOLIS), portable energy storage systems (COR), and heat pump systems (AetherLux) for automotive aftermarket, clean energy, and HVAC markets. It sells to consumers through direct-to-consumer and online retailers, and to businesses through dealers, distributors, wholesalers, and OEMs.

exposures.sentence: SOLIS is a folding solar-integrated tonneau cover designed to combine cargo protection with on-vehicle renewable power generation.
COR is a portable energy storage system designed to store and deliver electrical power for mobile, off-grid, and backup power applications.
we plan to market the SOLIS as a must-have accessory for electric light duty vehicle owners
The AetherLux Pro model is designed as a Combined Cooling, Heating, and Power (CCHP) system that redefines energy efficiency in cold climates.
we announced that we had doubled our Bitcoin holdings and invested in additional manufacturing machinery to double its production output
joint battery pack development, thermal runaway protection and AI-integrated battery management system software design

catalysts.event: Commercial launch of SOLIS truck-mounted folding solar array and COR portable battery system
catalysts.sentence: On December 1, 2025, we announced the commercial launch of our SOLIS truck-mounted folding solar array and COR portable battery system, which together form a modular, vehicle-mounted clean-energy solution.

catalysts.event: HD3 heavy-duty hard-folding tonneau cover entered commercial sales
catalysts.sentence: On November 25, 2025, we announced that our HD3 heavy-duty hard-folding tonneau cover entered commercial sales through our business-to-business dealer network following the commencement of production in mid-October 2025.

catalysts.event: Opening of newly leased facility in Missouri for assembly, testing, and distribution
catalysts.sentence: On November 18, 2025, we announced the opening of a newly leased facility in Missouri to support the assembly, testing, and distribution of our SOLIS solar-integrated tonneau cover and COR energy products.

catalysts.event: AetherLux Pro heat pump received attention from multi-billion dollar corporations and U.S. government entities
catalysts.sentence: On July 16, 2025, we announced that the AetherLux Pro heat pump with high-performance Zerofrost technology a product of its subsidiary, Terravis Energy - had received the attention of multi-billion dollar corporations and U.S. government entities, with site visits and due diligence underway.

catalysts.event: Secured ISO 9001 Certification at U.S. Factory
catalysts.sentence: On May 28, 2025, we announced that we secured ISO 9001 Certification at our U.S. Factory, expected to pave new inroads towards substantial new OEM and global supply chain opportunities.

catalysts.event: Announced two major breakthroughs in cold climate heat pump technology
catalysts.sentence: On February 11, 2025, we announced two major breakthroughs in cold climate heat pump technology developed by its subsidiary, Terravis Energy.

catalysts.event: Strategic partnership with KULR Technology Group
catalysts.sentence: On February 13, 2025, we announced our strategic partnership with KULR Technology Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: KULR), focused on advancing battery technology and strengthening domestic manufacturing, including, without limitation, joint battery pack development, thermal runaway protection and AI-integrated battery management system software design.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. tonneau cover market was $2.56 billion in 2024, growing at 7.1% CAGR from 2025 to 2030
tamClaims.sentence: the size of the tonneau cover market within the U.S., which was estimated to be $2.56 billion in 2024, is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 7.1% from between 2025 and 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Global Portable Power Station Market growing at 5.3% CAGR from 2025 to 2035
tamClaims.sentence: The global Portable Power Station Market is large and growing with a compound annual growth rate of 5.3% between 2025 and 2035.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. pickup truck market growing at 5.3% CAGR from 2025 to 2030
tamClaims.sentence: Within the U.S., the pickup truck market is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 5.3% between 2025 and 2030.

tamClaims.claim: North America electric pickup truck market growing at 29.86% CAGR from 2025 to 2029
tamClaims.sentence: the electric pickup truck market is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate of 29.86% between 2025 and 2029 within North America.
